title: GEEPAS Steam Iron | Clothes Dry & Steam Press | 50s Fast Heat-Up, Vertical Steaming | Ceramic Soleplate & Adjustable Temperature | 250ml Water Tank with 1g/Steam Output | 2 Year Warranty 2400W Black
features: ✅ POWERFUL 2400W PERFORMANCE, FAST HEAT-UP – The Geepas Steam irons deliver quick 50 seconds heat-up and efficient ironing. It ensures faster crease removal, making ironing effortless and saving time on busy mornings.

✅ CERAMIC SOLEPLATE – The flat iron is equipped with a ceramic soleplate, iron steamer glides seamlessly over all fabric types without snagging or burning. The thick soleplate ensures even heat distribution for a professional finish.

✅ ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE, VARIABLE STEAM CONTROL – Lightweight steam irons feature a customizable thermostat dial to suit fabrics like cotton, silk, linen, wool, and synthetics. Choose from continuous steam (25g/min) or steam burst (1g/min) for stubborn creases.

✅ LARGE 250ML WATER TANK, POWERFUL STEAM OUTPUT – Equipped with a 250ml water tank, this steam iron ensures long ironing sessions. Delivers a continuous steam flow of 25g/min and a steam boost of 1g/min, effectively removing stubborn creases for crisp, professional results.

✅ SAFETY & SELF-CLEANING FUNCTION – The heat-resistant, shockproof ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip, making ironing comfortable and safe. The built-in self-cleaning function helps prevent limescale buildup, maintaining optimal performance and extending the iron’s lifespan.
description: Product Description ANTI DRIP & ANTI CALC FUNCTION Anti-drip prevents staining of clothes, whilst anti-calc protects against lime scale with a self-cleaning button. POWERFUL STEAM BOOST Tackles even the most stubborn creases and wrinkles. PRECISE TEMPERATURE CONTROL Achieve perfect ironing results on all fabric types. CERAMIC SOLEPLATE The ceramic soleplate will ensure a smooth and soft glide of the iron over the fabric. 250ML WATER TANK CAPACITY Iron through a basket of clothes without stopping to refill. MULTI-FUNCTIONAL IRONING The iron has Multi Iron Modes, Wet/Dry, Steam & Spray Function. SELF CLEANING FUNCTION With a self-cleaning button to help flush out any build-up and maintain the iron's high performance and also increase product life. SPRAY NOZZLE It makes the fabric moist, this is followed by the heat, and it makes the entire surface even.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Anti Drip & Calc Function, Continuous Steam Technology, Non-Stick Soleplate, Spray & Steam Burst Setting, Steam Boost Function
